text: 3367 - رَوَى طَلْحَةُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : "أَنَّ رَسُولَ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ قَضَى بِالشُّفْعَةِ مَا لَمْ تُوَرَّفْ يَعْنِي تُقْسَمْ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3367 - Talhah ibn Zayd narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), peace be upon them:
"Indeed, the Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) ruled in favor of preemption (shufah) as long as the property had not been inherited, meaning divided."
